title: Mine Team
description: Inspired by the team system in the famous game Terraria, it also supports teaming up with all monsters
body:
## MineTeam
* Inspired by the team system of the famous game Terraria, it also supports teaming up with all the monsters, and when your team members receive damage, the monsters in the team will help you to participate in the battle together!
* If you want to team up with monsters, you can use a Weakness Potion + Golden Apples (default) like the Zombie Villager Conversion normally does
* If you have special needs, you can change the Item of the team for a specific monster in the configuration file
